transcript.text:
right below the main @index.html chart we have just enough space to store a line of text - it should be an 'agi detector'. it takes the highest score across all models and prints a message depending on it. messages and >= score barriers should be listed in a seperate agi.json file

>= 0 no intelligence has been detected
>= 20 CODE RED! intelligence has been found!
>= 40 intelligence detected; agi is getting closer
>= 60 agi is near
>= 80 CODE RED! AGI IS EXTREMELY NEAR!
>= 100 UNLEASHED AGI

Plan: create `agi.json` (barriers+messages), add `#agi` line below `.labels`, fetch + compute max score, pick highest matching barrier, show message.

Creating `agi.json`:

transcript.name: write
transcript.content:
[
  { "min": 0,   "msg": "no intelligence has been detected" },
  { "min": 20,  "msg": "CODE RED! intelligence has been found!" },
  { "min": 40,  "msg": "intelligence detected; agi is getting closer" },
  { "min": 60,  "msg": "agi is near" },
  { "min": 80,  "msg": "CODE RED! AGI IS EXTREMELY NEAR!" },
  { "min": 100, "msg": "UNLEASHED AGI" }
]

transcript.text: Now editing `index.html` — add CSS, HTML element, JS logic:

transcript.name: edit
diff: +  #agi .agi-peak { color: var(--fg-faint); font-size: 0.8rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; flex: none; }
+      .then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('agi.json: HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); })
+        const match = [...bars].sort((a, b) => b.min - a.min).find(b => peak >= b.min) || bars[0];

transcript.text:
Done. Summary:

**`agi.json`** — new file, 6 barriers `{min, msg}` ascending.

**`index.html`**:
- `#agi` box added below `.labels`: pulsing dot + "AGI Detector" label + message + peak %.
- `updateAgi(data)`: computes `max(score/total*100)` across models, fetches `agi.json`, sorts barriers desc, picks first where `peak >= min`, sets message. `CODE RED` triggers `.red` class (red dot glow + pulse + red text).
- Called at end of `render()`.

Current data: max = 40% (claude-fable-5 2/5) → shows "intelligence detected; agi is getting closer".
